schedule: after 9am and before 5pm on Monday to Friday

packageRules.description: Enable Renovate for pub (Flutter/Dart) dependencies
Group minor/patch Flutter/Dart updates
schedule: after 9am and before 5pm on Monday to Friday

packageRules.description: Keep coordinated pub pins out of dart-minor-patch (cannot combine ignoreDeps with matchUpdateTypes)
Hold genui ^0.7 until genui_google_generative_ai supports newer core (pubspec.yaml)
Hold google_sign_in_mocks ^0.3; 0.4+ needs google_sign_in 7 (firebase_ui on 6)
Hold intl to Flutter SDK pin (flutter_localizations constrains intl on stable)
Hold package:test below 1.31.2; flutter_test on current SDK pins test_api 0.7.11 (test 1.31.2 needs 0.7.13)
json_serializable 6.14+ needs analyzer >=10; path lints mix_lint/file_length_lint use analysis_server_plugin (custom_lint not in graph); verify with tool/check_pubspec_codegen_compat.sh
Separate major version updates for Flutter SDK
schedule: after 9am and before 5pm on Monday to Friday

packageRules.description: Pin Flutter SDK version
Ignore dependency_overrides (handled manually)
Auto-merge patch updates for dev dependencies
Hold Dart/analyzer toolchain until coordinated upgrade
Hold eslint v9+ until flat config and @typescript-eslint v8 migration (functions/)
Flutter plugin loader is not on Maven Central; Gradle resolves it via the plugin portal (fixes Renovate no-result on issue #2)
Do not renovate vendored third_party Android Gradle trees (duplicate plugin IDs; not app-owned)
